sprite

fingerprint.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include <boost/dynamic_bitset.hpp>
00007 
00008 namespace sprite
00009 {
00010   enum ChoiceDirection { LEFT=0, RIGHT=1 };
00011 
00018   struct Fingerprint
00019   {
00027     Fingerprint(size_t sz=0) : m_has(sz), m_at(sz) {}
00028 
00030     bool has(size_t id) const { return this->m_has[id]; }
00031 
00033     ChoiceDirection at(size_t id) const
00034     {
00035       assert(this->has(id));
00036       return this->m_at[id] ? RIGHT : LEFT;
00037     }
00038 
00040     void resize(size_t sz)
00041     {
00042       m_has.resize(sz);
00043       m_at.resize(sz);
00044     }
00045 
00047     void set(size_t id, ChoiceDirection x)
00048     {
00049       this->m_has.set(id);
00050       this->m_at.set(id, x==LEFT ? false : true);
00051     }
00052 
00054     size_t size() const
00055     {
00056       assert(this->m_has.size() == this->m_at.size());
00057       return this->m_has.size();
00058     }
00059   private:
00060     typedef boost::dynamic_bitset<> storage_type;
00061     storage_type m_has, m_at;
00062   };
00063 }
